CVE-2020-12050.title: SQLiteODBC 0.9996, as packaged for certain Linux distributions as ...
CVE-2020-12050.description: SQLiteODBC 0.9996, as packaged for certain Linux distributions as 0.9996-4, has a race condition leading to root privilege escalation because any user can replace a /tmp/sqliteodbc$$ file with new contents that cause loading of an arbitrary library.
